name: textarea
title: Textarea
description: Terminal-styled multi-line text area with size variants and error state. Shares base styling with Input via input-variants.

registry/ui/textarea/index.ts.raw:
"use client";

export { Textarea, type TextareaProps } from "./textarea";

docs.description: Terminal-styled multi-line text area with size variants and error state. Shares base styling with Input via input-variants.

notes.title: Error State
notes.content: Setting error={true} applies a destructive border color and sets aria-invalid on the element for accessibility.
